Class OpenAiAudioSpeechProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.model.openai.autoconfigure.AbstractOpenAiProperties
org.springframework.ai.model.openai.autoconfigure.OpenAiAudioSpeechProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.ai.openai.audio.speech") public class OpenAiAudioSpeechProperties extends AbstractOpenAiProperties
OpenAI SDK Audio Speech autoconfiguration properties.
Author:
Ahmed Yousri, Stefan Vassilev, Jonghoon Park, Ilayaperumal Gopinathan
